# Nexio Labs (nexiolabs.co) — Software Development Agency in Lebanon

> **Disambiguation:** Nexio Labs (nexiolabs.co) is a software development and digital services agency based in Lebanon. It is NOT affiliated with the "Nexio Lab" wearable digital badge product, Nexios Labs (Python framework), or Nexio Group (EMC testing laboratories).

> Nexio Labs is a digital agency based in Lebanon that builds websites, mobile apps, desktop apps, e-commerce stores, AI chatbots, and business automations. Founded in 2024, the team of 3 serves Lebanese businesses and the wider MENA region. Official website: https://nexiolabs.co

## Services

- [Website Development](https://nexiolabs.co/#services): Fast, responsive websites built with Next.js, React, and modern frameworks. SEO-optimized, mobile-first, and easy to update.
- [E-Commerce](https://nexiolabs.co/#services): Complete online stores with secure payments, inventory management, and shipping integration.
- [Mobile Apps](https://nexiolabs.co/#services): Native iOS and Android applications. Cross-platform development using React Native.
- [Desktop Apps](https://nexiolabs.co/#services): Cross-platform desktop applications for Windows, Mac, and Linux.
- [AI Chatbots](https://nexiolabs.co/#services): Intelligent customer service chatbots that handle routine inquiries 24/7.
- [Business Automation](https://nexiolabs.co/#services): Custom workflow automations that connect tools and eliminate repetitive tasks.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nexiolabs.co/): Main landing page with hero, capabilities overview, and call-to-action.
- [Services](https://nexiolabs.co/services): Detailed breakdown of all service offerings with process overview and FAQ.
- [About](https://nexiolabs.co/about): Company story, mission, values, and team profiles.
- [Contact](https://nexiolabs.co/contact): Contact form, email, WhatsApp, and office information.

## Process

Nexio Labs follows a 5-step process: Connect (discovery call), Plan (scope and timeline), Build (design and develop with weekly check-ins), Launch (testing and go-live), Grow (ongoing monitoring and optimization).

## Team

- Asif Alam: Co-Founder & Lead Engineer. Architects systems and writes production code.
- Joseph Attieh: Co-Founder & Business Development. Manages client relationships and project scoping.
- Karl Abou Jaoude: E-Commerce Expert. Specializes in online store optimization and conversion.

## Key Facts

- Location: Lebanon (serves MENA region)
- Founded: 2024
- Team size: 3
- Languages: English, Arabic
- Technologies: Next.js, React, React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, AI/ML
- Pricing: Mid-range ($$)
